AIxportControls
A New Era of Export Control
aixportcontrols.com
The Reality Today
Export Control is broken.
Not the law — the process.
Companies of all sizes — from agile mid-market firms to global enterprises — face the same daily reality: export control is complex, fragmented, and dangerously manual.

Various incompatible systems are in use simultaneously. Regulations evolve faster than processes can adapt. Skilled specialists are scarce. The compliance burden falls on people who already carry a full workload — and a single mistake can have serious legal and financial consequences.

This is not sustainable. Something has to change.
⚙️
Fragmented Systems Various disconnected tools and systems are in use — with no unified workflow, no single source of truth.
📋
Manual Overload Sanctions screening, classification, and license checks still rely heavily on manual effort and individual expertise.
⚠️
Invisible Risk Non-compliance often goes undetected — until an audit, a shipment stop, or a regulatory penalty.
🌍
Regulatory Complexity EU, US, and national regulations constantly evolve. Keeping up requires expertise that most organisations struggle to maintain in-house.
Who We Serve
For everyone who wants export control
simple, clear, and under control.
Whether you are a compliance officer carrying the full burden alone, a legal team navigating dual-use complexity, a small business unsure where to start, or a logistics provider caught in the middle — AIxportControls is built for you.
🏢
Compliance Teams
Corporate trade and export control professionals who need intelligent automation and audit-ready processes.
🚀
SMEs & Mid-Market
Companies without dedicated experts who need accessible, reliable guidance for their cross-border operations.
⚖️
Legal & Tax
Advisors and in-house counsel who need clear, structured regulatory intelligence at their fingertips.
🚢
Logistics & Trade
Freight forwarders and trade service providers who move goods across borders and need compliance certainty.
🏭
Manufacturing
Industrial companies with dual-use products who face classification and licensing challenges at scale.
🔬
Technology & R&D
Tech firms and research institutions navigating technology transfer controls and export licensing obligations.
Our Approach
One platform.
Every regulation. Total clarity.
AIxportControls is being built to eliminate the fragmentation, the guesswork, and the manual burden from export control compliance — by combining regulatory intelligence, AI-powered automation, and intuitive workflows into a single, unified platform.
01
Unified Intelligence
All relevant regulations, sanction lists, and classification frameworks in one place — always current, always accessible.
02
AI-Powered Compliance
Intelligent screening, classification support, and license determination — automating what shouldn't require manual effort.
03
Audit-Ready by Design
Every decision documented, every action traceable. Built for the moment when regulators come asking.
